changes.text: Header: Miles wordmark left-aligned, solid bg (no backdrop blur), sticky flush to top-0
Filter pills: sticky-until-displaced — locked to header bottom, peeled away by AI card scroll
Stats bento: dots removed, score to 1 decimal, label renamed 'Miles Score', delta arrow inline
Activity feed: chevrons removed, all 4 card types fully iOS-tokenized
Map: vehicle status label moved below avatar; filter pills repositioned above map
Figma: dashboard variable-linking via use_figma (in progress)
Dashboard fully tokenized — zero non-token color or radius utilities
Typography: 18 roles mapped to iOS HIG Dynamic Type (.largeTitle → .caption2)
Color tokens: semantic light + dark mode, full primitive palette
iOS Swift package — MilesTokens.swift with adaptive Color, Radius, and Spacing enums
Figma: dashboard screen capture complete, token variables synced via Figma MCP use_figma

upcoming: v0.1 → v0.2: Trip detail screen tokenized + added to screen inventory
v0.2 → v0.3: Figma dashboard variable-linking complete, color values refined
v0.x → v1: Full dashboard + 2–3 additional screens, Figma fully linked
